name: on-save-modern-domain
description: Re-run rules verify for rules affected by a modern domain file change, and downgrade their status if examples fail.

notify.title: Rule verification failed
notify.message: One or more rule examples failed against ${trigger.filePath}. Run `rules verify` locally to investigate. Affected rule status will be reset to implemented_unverified.

notes: This hook runs on every save to modern domain code, which can be noisy.
If verification becomes slow, scope it via --rule <id> using a project-
specific lookup, or move the heavy verification to pre-push instead.
